hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "(rm\s+-rf|rm\s+-r\s+/|sudo\s|chmod\s+777|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+push\s+-f|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE|DROP\s+DATABASE)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected — $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'SECRETS=$(git diff --cached --diff-filter=ACM -- . | grep -iEnc "(api_key|api_secret|secret_key|password|token|credential|private_key)\s*[=:]\s*[\x27\"][^\x27\"]+[\x27\"]" 2>/dev/null || echo "0"); if [ "$SECRETS" -gt 0 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Potential secret detected in staged files. Run: git diff --cached | grep -iE secret" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.py$"; then if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff check "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -5 || true; fi; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.tsx?$"; then if command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx tsc --noEmit "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -5 || true; fi; fi; exit 0'
